inputs.name: projectPath
inputs.description: Absolute path to the selected project root.

inputs.name: repositoryPath
inputs.description: Resolved repository identity hint for the selected project.

inputs.name: ponytailCommandIds
inputs.description: Selected ponytail command id that determines the bound skill and intensity.

inputs.name: ponytailQuery
inputs.description: Task description, code target, audit scope, or help request entered by the user.

inputs.name: targetScopeMarkdown
inputs.description: Frontend-composed markdown scope block built from selected repositories and their access labels.

inputs.name: targetRepositories
inputs.description: Selected repositories and their access types.
